fields.name: businessPartnerCategory
fields.label: Business Partner Category
fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT MAX(C_BP_GROUP_ID) FROM C_BP_GROUP WHERE AD_ISORGINCLUDED(@AD_ORG_ID@, AD_ORG_ID, @#AD_CLIENT_ID@) <> -1 AND ISDEFAULT = 'Y' AND AD_CLIENT_ID = @#AD_CLIENT_ID@

derivation.source: SELECT MAX(C_BP_GROUP_ID) FROM C_BP_GROUP WHERE AD_ISORGINCLUDED(@AD_ORG_ID@, AD_ORG_ID, @#AD_CLIENT_ID@) <> -1 AND ISDEFAULT = 'Y' AND AD_CLIENT_ID = @#AD_CLIENT_ID@

fields.name: lineNo
fields.label: Line No.
fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_BPARTNER_DISCOUNT WHERE C_BPARTNER_ID=@C_BPARTNER_ID@

derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_BPARTNER_DISCOUNT WHERE C_BPARTNER_ID=@C_BPARTNER_ID@
